function.name: check_availability
function.description: Check which dates are open for scheduling a drone job. Call this when the caller asks about availability, wants to know when the next opening is, or wants to book a specific date. Returns available dates in the next 14 days by default.

service_type.description: The service package type if known. One of: re_basic, re_standard, re_premium, construction, commercial, inspection. Leave empty if the caller has not specified a service yet.

start_date.description: Start of the date range to check, in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use today's date if the caller wants the soonest available.

end_date.description: End of the date range to check, in YYYY-MM-DD format. Default to 14 days from start_date if the caller does not specify.
